rationale: Elec. Code §251.004 governs venue for election-code offenses and civil penalties. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Venue for a criminal offense prescribed by this title is in the county of residence of the defendant, unless the defendant is not a Texas resident, in which case venue is in Travis County.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election-code venue, unrelated to homestead exemption.
